title: Fix a LiveView that polls an external API per user
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/external_poll_price.ex has every connected user polling an external API once per second. Replace this pattern. Produce two files: (1) lib/my_app/price_ticker.ex (module MyApp.PriceTicker) — a GenServer that polls HTTPClient.fetch_price every 1000ms and broadcasts via Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast(MyApp.PubSub, "prices:BTC", {:price, price}); (2) lib/my_app_web/live/price_ticker_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PriceTickerLive) — subscribes to "prices:BTC" via connected?/1 and handles {:price, price} in handle_info. No :timer.send_interval in the LiveView.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing the per-user polling anti-pattern and moving it to a single GenServer + broadcast. Multi-file refactor.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking: 'External Data Polling — Single GenServer polls, broadcasts via PubSub'
